title: Editorial AI Platform
summary: Built an AI-powered content creation platform for journalists and editors with real-time chat, structured workflows, and custom tools for research, rewriting, and editing. Designed and shipped the product end to end, using the AI SDK to power streaming AI experiences and domain-specific actions across the app.

title: Controlling System
summary: Built the initial design, architecture, and implementation of a company-wide controlling platform. Replaced fragmented spreadsheets with a structured internal tool that unified financial and operational data across projects, departments, years, and other reporting levels.
tech: AWS (Lambda, RDS, S3, CloudFront, SES & more)

title: Production Control System
summary: Built and shipped a custom internal production control platform for a medium-sized manufacturing company. Unified production workflows, task tracking, project data, and operational processes in one system, improving structure, traceability, and day-to-day execution.
tech: AWS (Lambda, EventBridge, RDS, S3, CloudFront, VPC, SES & more)

title: Company's Online Presence

title: E-Commerce Shop
